'''Algarra II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Algarra system/Legends|Algarra system]] the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] on which [[Tord Gamb]] engaged in confidence schemes, contributing to a 25,000-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] placed on him by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Planet-stub}}
